bead.title: Stage 3.2: scaffold SvelteKit with Bun
bead.description: Run `cd cli/internal/server && bun create svelte@latest frontend --template skeleton --types typescript` (or equivalent Bun-compatible scaffold that writes to cli/internal/server/frontend/). Install: @sveltejs/adapter-static, tailwindcss+autoprefixer+postcss, @playwright/test, vitest, svelte-check, prettier+prettier-plugin-svelte, eslint+eslint-plugin-svelte. Create frontend/README.md documenting `bun` commands. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #28.
bead.acceptance: (1) `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun install` succeeds. (2) `bun run dev` starts dev server on :5173. (3) `bun run build` produces build/index.html + static assets. (4) `bun run test` (vitest) runs, returns OK even if no tests yet. (5) `bun run test:e2e` (Playwright) runs, returns OK even if no tests yet. (6) frontend/README.md documents the bun commands. (7) package.json uses 'bun' not 'npm' in scripts.
